there is a gap of protection of games.

paragraphs.text: Hello there! I hope your day is quite good! So, I read a bit and there is a gap of protection of games. Like misleading marketing by influencers. I have seen mobile games over and over, marketing something and then when I install the game, it is not the game that has been marketing. It is a whole different game! I hope that this could be included as there is already laws that is against false marketing, but it seems not to do anything about mobile games. Also Dark patterns, when I try to click off mobile games, like that cross, the X I am still being taken to their download site, and I have to press X at least 3-4 times which is annoying and one of those time I miss and get taken to their download site. Talking about games,I am a strong supporter of stop killing games, for the reason that when I bought a game, I believe it was the product I bought and not a license. Also they never tell when the license is ending, it could end in a few months to a year or more. So I play the game and next day, it is suddenly gone or unplayable. All money I spend into it, or I bought the game, now the money is wasted and I can't play the product I love. I wish there was protection, at least not a plan of obsolescence to the product for consumers all over Europe. One big game it happened to was The Crew, which there is a lawsuit over right now. I don't want force companies to always have servers for their games, that is not fair to them. But I wish there was an end of life plan for the game, a way for the fans to maybe make servers, or a system where the consumer can play the game without the company losing money to keeping the servers on for the game. At least a plan so the product does not vanish. The citizen initiative for this already have over 1 million EU people that has signed, so I believe this is another path perhaps that can help to have a digital fairness for consumers to include games in it that is now a heavily a digital product. Thank you for reading this, and thank you for your time. I hope your life will be filled with luck and good moments!
